name: WLF_GRW_GUIDES_F_TL
description: Table to store language-dependent translations for grow guides.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Name of guide to succinctly capture the essence of the guide.

columns.Name: PLAIN_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Brief description in plain text about the guide.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
